'''âj-s-y-v''' ('''kajasyevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:welsh|welsh]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-s-y-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:welsh|welsh]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-s-y-v
|-
! Lemma
| kajasyevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijasyevoko|thijasyevoko]] || [[word:jijasyevoko|jijasyevoko]] || [[word:shijasyevoko|shijasyevoko]] || [[word:kijasyevoko|kijasyevoko]]
